title: Wio SX1262 with XIAO nRF52840
description: Ultra-compact LoRa development board combining the XIAO nRF52840 with an onboard SX1262 module. The low-power nRF52 chipset makes it ideal for battery-powered nodes.
commentary: These are the absolute cheapest way to get started on the mesh. They are a bit trickier, requiring soldering skills for power, but are so small they fit just about anywhere. We've even put one inside of a DJI drone to make an integrated airborne mesh node to expand the network.
